items.author: Dalton Johnson
items.body_excerpt:
Lajae Jones' final 14 games at FSU: 15.5 ppg, 6.5 rpg, 1.1 spg, 1.1 bpg on 45.7/35.7/78.3 shooting splits 

On the season:
4 20-point games
12 games scoring 10+ points
11 games of 5+ rebounds
9 steals in final 3 games

items.title: Warriors have plenty of roster business ahead, but very possible 54th overall pick Lajae Jones becomes a stash or two-way candidate. They don't anticipate being as financially constricted as in past years, so 2nd round rookie minimum contract not as necessary. Could change.

Warriors in the second round select 6-foot-7 Florida State wing Lajae Jones. Second team All-ACC. Streaky shot but can get hot.

With the Warriors In need of wings, he's worth a look.

items.title: The Warriors drafted Lajae Jones out of Florida State with the No. 54 pick
items.author: Dalton Johnson
items.body_excerpt:
The Warriors drafted Lajae Jones out of Florida State with the No. 54 pick 

Jones is a 6-foot-7 wing who is 22 years old and averaged 12.7 points and 5.7 rebounds per game last season
